reviews.content:

지퍼백 타입으로 보관하기 편하네요😊

간식스낵류 잘못 먹으면 토하기도 해서 잘 안줬었는데
이건 섭취 후 문제도 없고 맛있게 먹어서 좋더라구요
reviews.content_en:
My kids eat wet food morning and night, so they need to use these dental treats, right?

CATZ PARTY Filling Cookie has a crispy exterior that cleans plaque once, and with air pockets throughout it cleans twice! It's a crispy treat that helps with oral care.

My second cat is still at an age where she needs me to cut up larger treats, but this one has a small size that's easy to eat. It doesn't contain artificial dyes/meat by-products/propylene glycol/chemical additives, so I can feed it with peace of mind. Plus it contains taurine, an essential amino acid cats need to get from food, and L-lysine which helps boost immunity!👍

With low calories, cats that need weight control won't have to worry, and the zipper bag packaging makes storage super convenient😊

I used to avoid giving treat snacks since they sometimes cause vomiting, but there are no issues after eating this and she enjoys it, so I'm happy with it.

reviews.content_en:
Listen to the crunchy crunchy sounds of delicious eating!! 🔊

(Perfect for light-eating kitties too ㅎ) CATZ PARTY Filling Cookie where you can manage oral health while going crunch crunch—isn't it just such an amazing product? 💗

reviews.content_en:
Ever since I got Soon-ja, I thought she'd expanded her taste with various treats and flavors, but as she's grown older her preferences have become more set and her taste has become very particular, with many failed treats along the way.

So here's my review, shared with a nervous heart!

CATZ PARTY Filling Cookie has been processed with high palatability and the texture helps manage tooth plaque, plus added skin and coat care ingredients to enhance health functional performance!
The small size is worry-free and since it uses hydrolyzed ingredients to be allergy-FREE, it's exactly the kind of treat that picky cat parents look for,, 

Soon-ja takes after me and prefers soft and chewy textures, so I was curious how she'd handle the crispy cookie texture! As expected, particular little Soon-ja wasn't easy about it from the start,, 
She sniffed really eagerly, seeming to smell something delicious, but worried the texture might feel unfamiliar, so when I tried to break one in half for her—inside it's creamy and moist! Crispy outside, soft inside!
When I coated it with her favorite treat stick, after some back-and-forth she finally ate it! After repeating a few times, she got used to it.
Seeing Soon-ja asking urgently with her paw for more, the palatability is definitely good! Since Soon-ja won't eat anything she doesn't like no matter what, I think picky cat friends will love it too!

With low calories, it's great to feed without worrying about weight, and since Soon-ja does hunting play often with frequent reward treats, it's perfect for friends like that!
With nutrition tailored perfectly for cat health, it's ideal for crispy-outside-soft-inside fans🧡

reviews.content_en:
🤍 Product name: BITE ME CAT'S PARTY Filling Cookies (Chicken/Seafood)
🤍 Review
- I'm a cat parent of two: a tuxedo cat that eats anything and Cheese, a cat with picky eating habits :)
Normally I pay the most attention to my cats' dental care, and I was a nomad when it came to treats other than Churu, but ㅠㅠ I finally seem to have found a permanent treat that even manages teeth!
Even before opening, the kids showed great interest (maybe they smelled it?) and ate it deliciously with a crunching sound, so the palatability was so good! Especially my Cheese cat is incredibly picky - she only has one type of wet food she'll eat - but she especially loved the seafood flavor ㅎㅎ
It's a treat that satisfies the owners too with a two-for-one benefit: not only coat management but also tooth care with the porous texture! The crunching sound is really loud each time they chew, so it seems like the plaque definitely gets removed ㅎㅎ
I received this product as a selected regular test panel member and wrote this review, but I do intend to repurchase!!

reviews.name: 금****

IBD고양이 율무가 먹어본 바잇미 캣츠파티 필링 쿠키

1.가수분해 간식이라 소화 걱정이 없어 좋았어요. 저희 율무는 소화하기 어려운 음식을 먹으면 금세 토해버리는데 캣츠파티 필링 쿠키는 잘 소화했어요. 이게 가장 큰 장점이었어요.👍
2.기호성이 좋다. 해산물, 치킨 안가리고 둘 디 질 먹더라고요.
3.간식인데 살만 찌는게 아니라 건강에도 좋은 성분이다.
4. 크기가 작아 고양이들이 편히 먹기 좋다.

이 네가지 장점만 해도 좋은데, 패키징도 보관하기 편한 지퍼백에요. 율무가 사료도 가수분해로 먹을 정도로 IBD에 신경쓰고 있는 중인데, 소화를 잘 할 수 있는 유일한 간식이라 앞으로 간식은 캣츠파티 필링 쿠키로 정착할것 같아요.
reviews.content_en:
IBD cat Yulmu tried BITE ME Catz Party Filled Cookie

1. Since it's hydrolyzed, there's no digestion worry - that's great! Our Yulmu tends to throw up immediately when eating hard-to-digest foods, but he digested the Catz Party Filled Cookie well. This was the biggest advantage.👍
2. Great palatability. He eats both seafood and chicken flavors without picking.👍
3. It's a treat, but not just fattening - it has health-beneficial ingredients.
4. The small size makes it easy for cats to eat.

With just these four advantages, it's already great, but the packaging is also convenient with a ziplock bag. Since Yulmu eats even regular food in hydrolyzed form due to IBD management, this is the only treat he can digest well, so I think Catz Party Filled Cookie will be our go-to treat from now on.
